meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build advanced user onboarding to overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. An expert case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for developers.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build a high-fidelity user onboarding flow that demonstrates mastery of state management and UX psychology. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform a simple feature into a standout case study for recruiters.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank screen, the familiar weight of 'no experience' hovering over your resume. Every job posting demands a portfolio, yet you have no projects to showcase. The gap between knowing how to code and proving you can ship production-grade features feels like an insurmountable canyon.

But here is the secret: engineering leads don't look for clones of generic to-do lists. They look for the ability to handle complexity, specifically in the parts of an app that generate revenue—like user onboarding. By mastering the friction-free, high-conversion flow of a professional SaaS, you aren't just writing code; you are demonstrating business-aligned engineering that gets you hired.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Define the transitions between onboarding steps to ensure a robust, non-linear experience that handles user data persistence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state machine configuration for a 4-step onboarding flow. Include validation logic for each step and persistent state storage using localStorage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a state machine for onboarding using XState patterns in a new feature directory.'

steps.title: Implementing Progressive Disclosure
steps.description: Build an interface that reveals complexity only when necessary, preventing user cognitive overload during the onboarding phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive onboarding component that uses progressive disclosure to collect user preferences without overwhelming the interface.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Refactor the current onboarding UI to use a stepper component with smooth CSS transitions.'

steps.title: Integrating Real-time Validation
steps.description: Add immediate feedback loops to your forms so users never feel lost or confused during account setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Zod schema and validation hook for an onboarding form that provides real-time feedback on password strength and email formatting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add Zod validation and toast notifications to the onboarding form inputs.'

steps.title: Optimizing for Analytics Tracking
steps.description: Add tracking events to every step of the onboarding funnel to prove you understand how to measure feature success.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a tracking service wrapper that triggers analytics events on step completion, error occurrence, and user drop-off points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Integrate a tracking middleware that logs onboarding progress to a mock analytics endpoint.'

steps.title: Polishing with Micro-interactions
steps.description: Add subtle animations to your onboarding flow to give the application a premium, high-end feel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Framer Motion transitions for the onboarding step-switch to provide a fluid, high-quality user experience.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add Framer Motion exit and enter animations to the onboarding stepper component.'

pro_tips: Always wrap your onboarding state in a Provider pattern to ensure global access without prop-drilling.
Treat your onboarding flow as an A/B testable module; modularity is what senior engineers look for in portfolios.
Implement a 'Save for Later' feature to demonstrate you understand that users have high churn rates during onboarding.
Use mock API delays in your development environment to test how your UI handles loading states and skeleton screens.
Document your decision-making process in a README.md specifically for the onboarding module; it shows architectural maturity.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy it to Vercel, record a 60-second Loom video explaining your architectural choices, and add the repository to your portfolio site.
content.conversion_block: Stop building generic projects that get ignored by recruiters. Build systems that solve real business problems and prove you are ready for the industry. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
